headline: GKOS Stock Up More Than 45% Since May-End: What's Driving the Rally?
summary: GKOS has surged nearly 45% since May-end as upbeat iDose TR commentary, strong sales and growth expectations lift investor confidence.

headline: Insulet Broadens Omnipod 5 Presence With Commercial Launch in Spain
summary: PODD expands Omnipod 5 to Spain, marking its 20th country launch and adding Omnipod Discover to strengthen digital diabetes care.
